files.patch:
@@ -88,0 +88,1 @@
+#ifndef __OpenBSD__
@@ -89,0 +90,1 @@
+#endif
@@ -172,1 +174,1 @@
-#ifdef _AIX
+#if defined(_AIX) || defined(__OpenBSD__)
@@ -312,0 +314,3 @@
+#ifdef _BSDONLY_SOURCE
+  static bool privileges = issetugid();
+#else
@@ -313,0 +318,1 @@
+#endif
@@ -400,1 +406,1 @@
-  int flags = MAP_PRIVATE NOT_AIX( | MAP_NORESERVE ) | MAP_ANONYMOUS;
+  int flags = MAP_PRIVATE NOT_BSD( NOT_AIX( | MAP_NORESERVE ) ) | MAP_ANONYMOUS;
@@ -434,0 +440,9 @@
+#elif defined(__OpenBSD__)
+  struct stat s;
+  if (fstat(fd, &s) == -1)
+    return -1;
+
+  if (s.st_size < offset + len) {
+    return ftruncate(fd, offset + len);
+  }
+  return 0;
@@ -546,1 +561,5 @@
-  return NOT_AIX(::)fileno(fp);
+#if defined(_AIX) || (defined(__OpenBSD__) && OpenBSD <= 202507)
+  return fileno(fp);
+#else
+  return ::fileno(fp);
+#endif
@@ -565,0 +584,1 @@
+#ifndef __OpenBSD__
@@ -584,0 +604,1 @@
+#endif
@@ -625,0 +646,1 @@
+#ifdef RLIMIT_AS
@@ -626,0 +648,1 @@
+#endif
@@ -632,1 +655,1 @@
-#if defined(LINUX) || defined(__APPLE__)
+#if defined(LINUX) || defined(_ALLBSD_SOURCE)
@@ -638,2 +661,2 @@
-  // MacOS; The maximum size (in bytes) to which a process's resident set size may grow.
-#if defined(__APPLE__)
+#if defined(_ALLBSD_SOURCE)
+  // MacOS and BSD; The maximum size (in bytes) to which a process's resident set size may grow.
@@ -741,1 +764,1 @@
-                   MAP_PRIVATE | MAP_NORESERVE | MAP_ANONYMOUS, -1, 0);
+                   MAP_PRIVATE NOT_BSD( | MAP_NORESERVE ) | MAP_ANONYMOUS, -1, 0);
@@ -807,0 +830,1 @@
+#ifdef RLIMIT_AS
@@ -808,0 +832,3 @@
+#else
+  int getrlimit_res = getrlimit(RLIMIT_DATA, &rlim);
+#endif
@@ -1437,0 +1464,1 @@
+#if !defined(__NetBSD__)
@@ -1444,0 +1472,1 @@
+#endif

@@ -811,1 +811,6 @@
-    os_sigaction = (os_sigaction_t)dlsym(RTLD_DEFAULT, "sigaction");
+#if defined(__NetBSD__)
+  #define SIGACTION_NAME "__sigaction14"
+#else
+  #define SIGACTION_NAME "sigaction"
+#endif
+    os_sigaction = (os_sigaction_t)dlsym(RTLD_DEFAULT, SIGACTION_NAME);
@@ -1050,0 +1055,1 @@
+#ifdef SI_ASYNCIO
@@ -1051,0 +1057,2 @@
+#endif
+#ifdef SI_MESGQ
@@ -1052,0 +1060,1 @@
+#endif
